title: cremolobus peruvianus
intro: Cremolobus peruvianus is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the Peruvian mustard or Peruvian rocket, which is a flowering plant native to Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cremolobus peruvianus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
